observedMutationClass: rule-harness script and test update; active plan artifact owner shape drift; active plan concrete artifact owner collision; progress evidence overload
acceptanceEvidenceClass: harness fixture tests and scoped review runs
rootCause: The tech-debt review command reported severity and scanned feature scopes without naming that the default scheduled review was feature-scope coverage rather than a whole-project debt audit.
prevention: Added explicit FeatureScope, ProjectSurface, and Deep modes plus Coverage reporting for feature scopes, project surfaces, runtime scene/prefab inspection, manual architecture review, and scanned roots.
verification: Ran tools/rule-harness/tests/Run-RuleHarnessTests.ps1 successfully; ran run-tech-debt-review.ps1 in default FeatureScope and ProjectSurface modes and confirmed summary/report coverage fields.
